name: A large bakery
description:
This large flet houses the city's bakery.  Several ovens line the back wall and
a large sheet of stone protects the flet from the heat that comes from these
massive ovens.  Several large bags sit on the floor and a large table for
kneading the items and rolling them sits in the middle.  A basin of water sits
in the far corner and a small bed sits on the wall farthest from the ovens.  A
large sign sits on the counter with the prices.
